title: One-binary S1: fold apicover into evolve — extract go/cmd/apicover core to go/internal/apicover, add 'evolve apicover' subcommand, ciparity calls the library in-process (delete runtime go-build)
summary: OPERATOR-BOOSTED to second-block priority 2026-07-13. APPROVED PLAN slice 1/5. Move go/cmd/apicover/{run,classify,cover,enumerate,ignore,refs}.go from package main to importable go/internal/apicover (mechanical; preserve Run(Config, io.Writer) from run.go:14-79). Add 'evolve apicover' subcommand (thin wrapper reproducing cmd/apicover/main.go:17-22: -cover, -require-doc, -enforce flags + positional package dirs; exit 2 on measurement error); register in go/cmd/evolve/registry.go. Rewrite apicoverEnforceChangedDefault (go/internal/phases/audit/ciparity.go:175-239) to call apicover.Run IN-PROCESS: delete the 'go build -o bin/apicover' at :208 and the subprocess at :238 (kills runtime executable-build site #1; audits get faster). go/cmd/apicover: keep as a <=10-line shim importing the internal package OR delete it and update .github/workflows/ci.yml — check ci.yml for standalone apicover references and pick accordingly. CRITICAL: graduate go/internal/apicover in go/.apicover-enforce WITH an apicover_named_test.go — the new-package graduation guard killed fleet-lane-provisioning-split 4x for omitting exactly this step.
acceptance: RED: TestCiparity_ApicoverRunsInProcess_NoBinaryCreated (cycle touching enforced pkg: audit passes, no bin/apicover file appears)
go/internal/apicover graduated in .apicover-enforce with named coverage test
